creator: jsa@FreeBSD.org
text:
After the release of Exaile 0.3.2.0, SHOUTcast made changes with the likely 
intent to purposely break compatibility with unlicensed 3rd party 
implementations. SHOUTcast's parent company, AOL, has been sending injunctions 
to certain FOSS developers requesting they comply with a license that is not 
favorable to open source license models. As such, the SHOUTcast plugin is 
actually being removed from Exaile in the next release rather than being fixed 
and the developers facing any such legal issues.

This is a link to the issue as announced by the makers of VLC, explaining why 
the feature was removed from their code base:

http://www.videolan.org/press/2010-1.html

There is still the possibility for using icecast I believe. If you would like to 
encourage the developers to explicitly keep support for icecast you might try 
the following avenues found here to voice your support:

http://exaile.org/support
